evals.prompt: Create the StagesController with all endpoints.
evals.expected_output: Creates StagesController inheriting ControllerBase, using a primary constructor that injects ICommandHandler and IQueryHandler for all operations — no IMediator. Includes GetAll, GetById, Create, Update, Delete. POST uses CreatedAtAction (201), DELETE NoContent (204), validation failures ValidationProblem (400), missing resource NotFound (404). All actions carry ProducesResponseType.
assertions: Controller uses a primary constructor with ICommandHandler/IQueryHandler parameters — no IMediator
Includes GetAll, GetById, Create, Update, Delete actions
POST action uses CreatedAtAction and ProducesResponseType(201)
DELETE action returns NoContent() with ProducesResponseType(204)
Validation failures use ValidationProblem() — not BadRequest()
GET single, PUT, DELETE declare ProducesResponseType(404)
Does NOT create handlers, entity, or DI registration

evals.prompt: Add request/response models and mapping extensions for the Routes API.
evals.expected_output: Creates Models.cs under src/HikingLog.Api/Routes/ with CreateRouteRequest, UpdateRouteRequest (no Id), RouteResponse. Creates MappingExtensions.cs with ToCommand() on CreateRouteRequest, ToCommand(int id) on UpdateRouteRequest, ToResponse() on RouteDto. All internal static with XML docs.
assertions: CreateRouteRequest record has the create fields
UpdateRouteRequest record has no Id property (id comes from the route segment)
ToCommand(int id) on UpdateRouteRequest passes id as the first argument to UpdateRoute
Mapping extensions are internal static methods
XML doc <summary> on all types and methods
